animation_keyframes.intense-glow: @keyframes intense-glow { 0% { filter: brightness(1) drop-shadow(0 0 20px currentColor); } 50% { filter: brightness(1.3) drop-shadow(0 0 40px currentColor); } 100% { filter: brightness(1) drop-shadow(0 0 20px currentColor); } }
animation_keyframes.pulse: @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1.05); } }
animation_keyframes.spin: @keyframes spin { from { filter: hue-rotate(0deg); } to { filter: hue-rotate(360deg); } }

usage_notes.phase_1: Pure solid colors - use for levels 1-100
usage_notes.phase_2: Linear and radial gradients - use for levels 101-200
usage_notes.phase_3: Gradients with box-shadow and animations - use for levels 201-300
usage_notes.phase_4: Advanced effects with multiple shadows, complex animations, and particle effects - use for levels 301+
usage_notes.scaling: Each entry roughly represents 2.5 levels (1000 levels / 400 entries)
usage_notes.css_application: Apply gradients directly as CSS backgrounds, shadows as CSS box-shadow, animations as CSS @keyframes
usage_notes.particle_effects: For phase 4, implement particle systems using Canvas or WebGL with the particle_count specified
usage_notes.optimization: For performance, consider using CSS transforms and GPU acceleration for animations
